summary: Tested P0 changes for iteration 45: Film poster grid 6 columns (lg:grid-cols-6), sticky section headers, AI poster JPEG compression with retry and cast_names. All features verified working. Backend 9/10 tests passed (1 minor attendance sorting issue). Frontend all features confirmed.

minor.issue: Films returned not strictly sorted by cumulative_attendance descending - 1712225 < 2094873

action_items: Minor: Fix /api/films/my/featured sorting - films not strictly sorted by cumulative_attendance

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features tested: 1) Film grids have lg:grid-cols-6 on both Dashboard and MyFilms pages - shows 6 columns on 1920px viewport (or fewer if user has fewer films). 2) Sticky headers work with sticky top-16 z-10 classes on both pages. 3) AI poster endpoint at /api/ai/poster accepts optional cast_names parameter, returns JPEG (data:image/jpeg;base64,...), has retry logic with max 2 attempts. 4) Frontend FilmWizard sends cast_names from selected actors (first 4) and director. User emiliano.andreola1@gmail.com has 5 films. Test account working.
